MODULE: cosmos.integration.bankr.trading
FILE: cosmos/integration/bankr/trading.py (313 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: Bankr Trading Module.

Handles buy, sell, swap operations across multiple chains.

CLASSES:
- TradeResult: Result of a trading operation.
  Methods: def from_job_result(cls, job: JobResult, trade_type: str) -> 'TradeResult'
  Methods: def error_result(cls, error: str, trade_type: str='unknown') -> 'TradeResult'
- BankrTrading: Crypto trading operations via Bankr API.

Supports:
- Buy tokens with USD
- Sell
  Methods: async def buy_token(self, token: str, amount_usd: float, chain: str=None) -> TradeResult
  Methods: async def sell_token(self, token: str, amount: float, chain: str=None) -> TradeResult
  Methods: async def swap(self, from_token: str, to_token: str, amount: float, chain: str=None) -> TradeResult
  Methods: async def bridge(self, token: str, amount: float, from_chain: str, to_chain: str) -> TradeResult
  Methods: async def get_price(self, token: str) -> float
  Methods: async def get_quote(self, from_token: str, to_token: str, amount: float, chain: str=None) -> Dict[st
  Methods: async def execute_trade(self, intent: Any) -> TradeResult
